text:
be an 
undercount if the beneficiary had managed care claims. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Claims File (derived) 

VALUES: $ 

COMMENT: CCW creates this variable as the sum of all MDCD_PD_AMT from all claims for the month, however we 
identify and remove the OT header claims that are for managed care capitated payments. These are 
header claims where the claim type code (T-MSIS variable called CLM_TYPE_CD) is equal to '2' 
(Medicaid or expansion claim) 'B' (S-CHIP claim) or 'V'
